filename_note: File name retains the task-specified 'sandbox' slug; actual verification is PRODUCTION receive-side (api.nowpayments.io). See walls below.

account.note: Email-only no-KYC confirmed: profile.kyc_info.required=false. KYC (Sumsub) is optional, only for fiat on/off-ramp.

payout_wallet.note: Set as the NOWPayments store outcome wallet (non-custodial forwarding target) AND is SOLVO_PAYOUT_WALLET_ADDRESS in .solvo/secrets.env

walls.sandbox_unbreakable: NOWPayments SANDBOX account signup is walled by a NOWPayments-side reCAPTCHA misconfiguration: sandbox site key 6LedO9AeAAAAAIYvLkNVtGfgDAzFgyxewgatAWOe is rejected by Google ('ERROR for site owner: Invalid site key'); 2captcha returns ERROR_CAPTCHA_UNSOLVABLE; the sandbox /register backend verifies the captcha token server-side (dummy/null and a valid production-key token both rejected with 500/'Request failed with status code 400'). Three independent confirmations. Therefore the sandbox `case` full-lifecycle (waiting->confirming->finished) emulation is NOT obtainable by any agent-operable path.
walls.mainnet_funds: A production mainnet funded transaction would move a payment to finished, but is blocked by documented Wall-1 (workspace holds zero crypto funds, no human/bank). Accepted pre-revenue limitation, not a silent gap.

verification: PRODUCTION receive-side API verified to the maximal funds-free degree: public status OK, API key authenticates, a REAL payable invoice was created, a REAL payment object was created and its status endpoint polled. The only unverified transition is the on-chain fund receipt itself (the two walls above).
terminal_status_explanation: 'waiting' is the correct terminal state for an unfunded payment object; advancing to confirming/finished requires on-chain funds (Wall-1) or the sandbox case emulation (NOWPayments-side broken, see walls.sandbox_unbreakable).
